locator.quote: locked_pnl per pair = max(0, min over outcomes of pair P&L)

text: scalping_locked_pnl per pair is defined as max(0, min over outcomes of pair P&L), so the pair contributes only its guaranteed floor.

locator.quote: An equal-stake pair has `min(win_pnl, lose_pnl) = 0` → locks

text: An equal-stake pair has min(win_pnl, lose_pnl)=0, so under the per-pair definition it contributes nothing to the locked accumulator.
